title: Florence, Tuscany — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Florence, Tuscany: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Florence is a city in Tuscany with a population of 367,000. The cradle of the Renaissance, home to Michelangelo’s David, Brunelleschi’s Duomo, and world-class art museums in a stunning Tuscan setting.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
